title: Mace to Steampunk Hammer
description: Retextures the mace to a steampunk hammer
body:
![Steampunk Hammer](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dfc6446527f2b2d1d178d3c9fa35ffaa2f9d6149_0.webp)

### **ABOUT**

Retextures the **mace** to a **steampunk hammer** model. If you are tired of the look of the vanilla mace and want to add a steampunky feel to your game, this is perfect for you! The texture is 128x128.\
More steampunk models for different weapons and tools soon!

_note: this only changes the mace texture itself, not the heavy core._

### **COMPATIBILITY**
Works in versions 1.20 to 1.21.11.

### **SUPPORT ME**
I have just started making textures and you can support me by downloading this and future uploads. Thank you and enjoy!
